turns.user: save the string SCRATCHPAD_EXCHANGE_VALUE to scratchpad key exchangetest
save the value LISTTEST to scratchpad key listcheck

exchange: scratchpad save then delete then list

turns.user: save the value DELETEME to scratchpad key tempkey

exchange: scratchpad then file write via token

turns.user: save the string TOKEN_WRITE_TEST to scratchpad key tokentest
write the content of scratchpad key tokentest to the file ./data/scratchpad_token_test.txt then read it back
